name: Dan Pasqua
transactions: June 7, 1982:Drafted by theNew York Yankeesin the3rd roundof the 1982 amateur draft.
November 12, 1987:Traded by theNew York YankeeswithSteve RosenbergandMark Salasto theChicago White SoxforRichard DotsonandScott Nielsen.
December 4, 1991:Signed as a Free Agent with theChicago White Sox.
